summary: Re-tested multi-division Budget App (REGIS/BLAST/SEO). Backend: 29/29 pytest cases PASS (budgets per division, expenses CRUD+filtering, dashboard aggregation, per-division stats/excel/pdf exports, soft delete, upload). Frontend: all critical flows verified visually — dashboard aggregation (Rp 3.000.000), tab switching, per-division metrics, Rupiah formatting, charts, export buttons, expense form, upload zone, data-testids. Iteration 1's HIGH priority object-storage 401 is RESOLVED — POST /api/upload now returns 200.

minor.issue: Returns a synthesised DivisionBudget with amount=0 when none exists (no 404). Acceptable for UX but masks 'not set' state from clients.
ExpenseUpdate omits divisi/bukti_path/bukti_filename — users cannot move expense across divisions or change/clear attachment on edit.
Bare except: swallows date-parse errors silently (line ~328).

issues: Monthly bar chart Y-axis still shows raw numbers, not Rupiah/short-form ticks (carry-over from iter 1).

action_items: Allow PUT /api/expenses/{id} to update divisi/bukti_path/bukti_filename (so user can re-categorise division and change/clear bukti).
Format chart Y-axis ticks with Rupiah short notation (e.g., Rp 160K) — carry-over.
Replace bare `except:` in get_expense_stats with `except (ValueError, KeyError)`.
Consider returning 404 from GET /api/budgets/{divisi} when no budget set (so UI can show 'not set' vs Rp 0).
critical_code_review_comments: Good: per-division endpoints are clean, aggregation in /dashboard/stats is correct (saldo = budget - pengeluaran verified in tests).
Good: soft-delete via is_deleted filter applied consistently across list/stats/export.
Negative budget rejected (400) but negative nominal also correctly rejected; however no Pydantic Field(ge=0) — relies on manual checks.
ExpenseUpdate missing divisi/bukti fields — limits edit completeness.
init_storage uses a module-global mutable `storage_key`; safe for single-worker but could re-init under concurrent first-request load (minor).

success_rate.frontend: 100% smoke (dashboard, 3 tabs, metrics, exports buttons, form, upload zone all present and functional)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed expenses across all 3 divisions and clean up via module-scoped fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests fully cover multi-division schema at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (29 cases incl. parametrized REGIS/BLAST/SEO). Object storage upload now works (was 401 in iter 1, now 200). Remaining items are non-blocking enhancements: ExpenseUpdate should accept divisi+bukti fields, chart Y-axis Rupiah formatting, replace bare except.
rca of the issue: N/A — iteration 1's blocker (POST /api/upload 500 from storage 401) is resolved as of this run.
